name: UNDERTALE RPG
description:
Kill or Mercy?

🌟 UNDERTALE: The Story 🌟

Long ago, two races ruled over Earth: HUMANS and MONSTERS.

🗡️ A war broke out. The humans won and sealed the monsters underground with a magic spell.

🌄 Many years later...
A human falls into the Underground.

Your choices will shape the world.
Will you show MERCY?
Or choose VIOLENCE?

The fate of monsters... is in your hands.

🧍 Main Character

🧒 Frisk – The fallen human. You decide who they become.

🌼 Key Characters

🌼 Flowey – A talking flower with a twisted smile.

🐐 Toriel – A kind goat mom who bakes pies and protects kids.

👻 Napstablook – A ghost who just wants to lie down and vibe.

💀 Sans – A lazy skeleton who knows more than he lets on.

💀 Papyrus – His loud, lovable bro who believes in YOU!

🛡️ Undyne – Fearless, passionate, and a total anime nerd.

🧪 Alphys – Shy scientist, watches too much Mew Mew Kissy Cutie.

📺 Mettaton – Glamorous robot superstar with a hidden agenda.

👑 Asgore – The king who must collect human souls... or must he?

⚠️ Secret & Side Characters

🌟 Asriel Dreemurr – The true identity of someone you once loved.

🩸 Chara – The first fallen child. Are they really gone?

🕷️ Muffet – Spider baker. Expensive taste in pastries.

😼 Burgerpants – Retail despair, existential crisis included.

🔥 Grillby – Silent, but cool. Literally fire.

😺 Temmie – hOI! welcom to da TEM SHOP!!

🐊 Monster Kid – No arms, lots of heart.

❓ Gaster – ???

🎮 Gameplay

- Fight or Spare
- Make friends or destroy them
- Every choice matters

YOU DETERMINED THAT, RIGHT?

💾 Routes

🕊️ Pacifist – No one has to die.
⚖️ Neutral – Some live, some don’t.
🔥 Genocide – No one is left.

✨ DETERMINATION ✨

This world is full of hope, pain, laughter, and heartbreak.
You are not just playing a game.
You're making a choice.

* Stay determined.
